programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: The Bellator MMA light heavyweight world grand prix kicks off when heavyweight champ Ryan Bader (27-6) meets Lyoto Machida (26-10) in a rematch. Plus, former world title challenger Liz Carmouche (14-7) faces Vanessa Porto (22-8) in a flyweight bout.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: BELLATOR champ Vadim Nemkov, Phil Davis, Corey Anderson in action.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Juan "The Spaniard" Archuleta (25-2) makes the first defense of his Bellator MMA Bantamweight World Championship against Sergio "S.P." Pettis (20-5) in a five-round main event. From May 7, 2021, at Mohegan Sun Casino, Uncasville, Conn.

programme.title: PFL 2024 Season
programme.desc: Main event: Valentin Moldavsky defeats Ante Delija.

programme.title: PFL 2024 Season
programme.desc: Main event: Impa Kasanganay defeats Alex Polizzi.

programme.title: Warriors Cup
programme.desc: July 21, 2023, replay from New York. Main event: Bryan Burgos vs Ryan Rutherford.

programme.title: Coach and Company
programme.desc: Jonathan Coachman hosts this no-holds-barred daily sports talk show. "The Coach" leads dynamic discussions with a rotating cast of all-star analysts and sports insiders.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: The Bellator MMA light heavyweight world grand prix kicks off when heavyweight champ Ryan Bader (27-6) meets Lyoto Machida (26-10) in a rematch. Plus, former world title challenger Liz Carmouche (14-7) faces Vanessa Porto (22-8) in a flyweight bout.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: BELLATOR champ Vadim Nemkov, Phil Davis, Corey Anderson in action.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Juan "The Spaniard" Archuleta (25-2) makes the first defense of his Bellator MMA Bantamweight World Championship against Sergio "S.P." Pettis (20-5) in a five-round main event. From May 7, 2021, at Mohegan Sun Casino, Uncasville, Conn.

programme.title: BKFC Fight Night - Hammond: Henry vs. Stewart
programme.desc: Bryce Henry vs. Roderick Stewart, welterweight; Cameron VanCamp vs. Derrick Findley, middleweight. From Horseshoe Hammond Casino in Hammond, Ind.

programme.title: BKFC Fight Night - Michigan: Rodriguez vs. Cavender
programme.desc: Esteban Rodriguez vs. Zac Cavender. From Mount Pleasant, Mich.

programme.title: BKFC 43: Alexander vs. Smith
programme.desc: Houston Alexander vs. Jeremy Smith, cruiserweights; Dakota Cochrane vs. Noah Cutter, middleweights; Brandon Meyer vs. Sean Wilson. From Liberty First Arena in Omaha, Neb.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Cris Cyborg takes on Leslie Smith in the main event from Mohegan Sun Arena in Uncasville, Conn. Cyborg and Smith first fought in the UFC in 2016. From May 21, 2021.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Douglas Lima defends his welterweight title against unbeaten Yaroslav Amosov. From Mohegan Sun.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Tim Johnson and Valentin Moldavsky vie for the interim heavyweight title from Mohegan Sun Casino.

programme.title: BYB Xtreme Fighting Series
programme.desc: Jozette Cotton vs. Miranda Barber, championship. From Oct. 16, 2022 at O2 Arena in London.

programme.title: International Brawling Championship 1
programme.desc: From Gold Coast, Queensland, Australia on Aug. 28, 2025.

programme.title: International Brawling Championship 3
programme.desc: From Gold Coast Sports & Leisure Center in Gold Coast, Australia.

programme.title: BKFC 47: Mundell vs. Richman
programme.desc: David Mundell vs. Mike Richman, middleweight championship bout. From Jenkins Arena in Lakeland, Fla.

programme.title: BKFC 49: Slaveski vs. Lindsey
programme.desc: Gorjan Slaveski vs. Jake Lindsey, welterweight championship bout; Bryce Henry vs. Tom Shoaff, lightweight. From Miami-Dade Fairgrounds in Miami-Dade County, Fla.

programme.title: BKFC 50: Hunt vs. Camozzi
programme.desc: Lorenzo Hunt vs. Chris Camozzi, cruiserweight championship bout; Keegan Vandermeer vs. Tyler Winemiller; Andrew Yates vs. Christian Torres, welterweight. From 1st Bank Center in Denver.

programme.title: BKFC 56
programme.desc: Mike Perry vs. Eddie Alvarez, middleweight; Ben Rothwell vs. Todd Duffee, heavyweight. From Maverik Center in Salt Lake City. From Dec. 2, 2023.

programme.title: PFL 2024 Season
programme.desc: Main event: Magomed Umalatov vs. Andrey Koreshkov.

programme.title: PFL 2024 Season
programme.desc: Main event: Linton Vassell vs. Valentin Moldavsky.

programme.title: BKFC 52: Barnett Jr. vs. Richardson
programme.desc: Reggie Barnett Jr. vs. Keith Richardson, bantamweight championship bout; Antonio Soto III vs. Kevin Croom, lightweight. From Columbia, S.C.

programme.title: BKFC 59: Dodson vs. Aguero
programme.desc: John Dodson vs. Dagoberto Aguero, flyweight championship bout; Donald Sanchez vs. Dallas Davison, middleweight. From Tingley Coliseum in Albuquerque, N.M.

programme.title: BKFC 61: Rivera vs. Straus
programme.desc: Jimmie Rivera vs. Daniel Straus, featherweight; Mike Trizano vs. Derek Campos, lightweight; Ryan Reber vs. Anthony Foye, bantamweight. From Mohegan Sun Arena in Uncasville, Conn.

programme.title: BKFC 72 Dubai: Stewart vs. Strydom
programme.desc: Kai Stewart vs. Tommy Strydom, featherweight championship; Hannah Rankin vs. Jessica Borga, women's featherweight championship. From Dubai Tennis Stadium in Dubai, U.A.E.

programme.title: BKFC 57
programme.desc: Ryan Reber vs. Derek Perez, bantamweight; Stephen Townsel vs. Leo Bercier, cruiserweight; Matt Russo vs. Justin Street, flyweight. From Hollywood, Fla.

programme.desc: Main event: Mads Burnell defeats Clay Collard.

programme.title: Bare Knuckle Boxing
programme.desc: Boxing in its purest form, with no gloves and hands are wrapped only.

programme.title: Extreme Fighting Championship 133
programme.desc: Zaakir Badat vs. Ziko Makengele, welterweight championship; Brandon Santos vs. Lihle Ngamnthwini, flyweight. From World Sports Betting Arena in Sandton, South Africa.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: Teton County SAR faces its toughest day yet: a lost hiker, a snowmobile crash, and an avalanche.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: SAR uses helicopters and controlled detonations for a rescue where calculated risks and courage are vital.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: A mountain biker crashes on a remote trail. SAR performs a long-line helicopter rescue against the clock.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: A snowboarder is caught in a high-risk avalanche zone. SAR braves the sliding terrain for a risky extraction.

programme.desc: Alex Honnold joins endurance runner Peyton Thomas for an unexpected adventure in the Ruby Mountains.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: A snowboarder is caught in a high-risk avalanche zone. SAR braves the sliding terrain for a risky extraction.

programme.title: Ski A&E
programme.desc: Following the Ski Patrol units of Val Thorens, we see the action behind the first line in emergency rescue.

programme.title: Life of Kai
programme.desc: Kai Lenny chases his big wave dream of a title at The Eddie before switching to compete at the Sunset Pro.

programme.title: Life of Kai
programme.desc: Kai Lenny chases a new challenge in Alaska where he meets up with snowboarding icon Travis Rice.

programme.title: Khanh Ong’s Wild Food
programme.desc: Chef Khanh Ong travels to Cairns Australia to embark on an adventure to the rainforests of Mission Beach.

programme.title: Get a Little Out There with Alex Honnold
programme.desc: Pro climber Alex Honnold explores the Las Vegas backyard he calls home.

programme.title: Get a Little Out There with Alex Honnold
programme.desc: Alex Honnold scales a vertical bus, a sand dune, and joins Tommy Caldwell for an ascent on a granite wall.

programme.title: Descending
programme.desc: Location: INDONESIA. Scott and Ellis experience Raja Ampat - a reserve rich in beauty, diversity and culture.

programme.title: Huckberry Homes
programme.sub-title: Full Vintage Van Tour: Inside This Photographer's Ultimate Camper Van
programme.desc: On this episode of Huckberry Homes, we caught our good friend and photographer James Barkman out in the wild.

programme.title: Huckberry Homes
programme.sub-title: Inside This Green Beret & Entrepreneur’s GORUCK Home Gym
programme.desc: We travel to Jacksonville, Florida, to meet up GORUCK Co-founder, and former Green Beret Jason McCarthy.

programme.title: Beat Monday
programme.desc: Mike and Jason head to Maui for a Sea to Sky to Sea multisport mission.

programme.title: Beat Monday
programme.desc: Mike and Jason return to Mexico to take on its highest point, the 18,000 foot dormant volcano Pico De Orizaba.

programme.title: Beyond Awestruck
programme.desc: The UCI team at the Tahoe Lab measures how awe impacts happiness, gratitude, relationships, and well-being.
